pi_items.source: Task description explicitly mandates this directory path.
Task description explicitly mandates creating this Python file.
Task description explicitly mandates creating this Talon file.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires the creation of a Talon module from scratch using two files: 'crypto_actions.py' and 'crypto_actions.talon', which must be located at 'C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\talon\user\crypto_tools'. An audit reveals that the expected setup and export PowerShell scripts ('setup_task.ps1' and 'export_result.ps1') are missing from the task directory, meaning the verifier will inevitably fail to fetch the output files.
